rulings.Case Title: AMERICAN EXPRESS TRAVEL RELATED SERVICES COMPANY VS. JOHN ARISTOTLE PHILLIPS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff American Express Travel Related Services Company Motion For Summary Judgment (Cont From 9/21/04 To 9/22/04)
rulings.Rulings: DENY-MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. GRANT-MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION RE COMPLAINT AS TO ARISTOTLE ON ALL COUNTS.PLAINTIFF TO RECOVER $29,031.74 AND 10% INTEREST OF 10% PER ANNUM FROM SEPT.2000. LATE FEES VIOLATES CCP1671 DENY- MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION RE COMPLAINT AS TO PHILIPS TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT EXIST KNOWLEDGE OF AGREEMENT. AS TO CROSS-COMPLAINT, BREACH OF CONTRACT DENY AS TO ARISTOTLE, GRANT AS TO PHILIPPS INTENTIONAL INFLECTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS AND NEGLIGENT INFLECTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS CUASES OF ACTIONS GRANT AS TO BOTH. IMPROPER DEBT COLLECTION CAUSES OF ACTION GRANT- AS TO BOTH ROSENTHAL FAIR DEBT COLLECTION CAUSES OF ACTION BEVERLY ACT. DENY OTHERS FAILED TO SUSTAIN BURDEN.(302/REQ/PB)
